The '''''Valorous''''' was a [[MC80 Liberty Type Heavy Star Cruiser|MC80 ''Liberty'' type]] [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] in service to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
The ''Valorous'' [[Battle of Esyram|attempted]] to pick up cargo containers in the [[Esyram system/Legends|Esyram system]] while the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] ''[[Warlover]]'' was attempting to destroy the cargo containers.<ref name="XWvTF" />

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]'', the outcome of the Imperial attack depends on which side the player takes.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]'' {{1st}}
